text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! I don't know why, but it feels like I'm
bubbling over with energy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And the interesting thing is, I'm the only person
who knows it. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh, I know just how I can use this to my
advantage.
